findings.finding: Cycle 2 could not independently confirm that local HEAD and the live remote bos/issue-51 branch still equal 40750c297ed42435dabe1d4670bfda85ce92af36 because the read-only command runner failed before Git executed (bubblewrap unavailable). Passing requires affirmative current identity evidence.

Existing exact-commit evidence reports complete inspection of the 8-file, 311-line patch: capacity wait reconciliation refreshes before dispatch; releases provider and local reservations for missing, terminal, and unroutable waiters; preserves local fencing when provider release fails; removes only stale local state for foreign ownership; and heartbeats valid owned waiters without consuming Attempt or retry budget.

Existing evidence is bound to 40750c297ed42435dabe1d4670bfda85ce92af36 and reports 363 tests passing, 100.00% coverage, strict Credo/spec checks passing, Dialyzer with zero errors, formatting passing, and clean diff hygiene. These unchanged validations were not rerun.
Exact merged-artifact installation and service-health verification remain post-merge delivery responsibilities and are not evidence for this pre-merge architecture decision.

summary: Architecture behavior and exact-commit validation evidence are affirmative, but cycle 2 is inconclusive because current local HEAD and live remote branch identity could not be independently re-confirmed.
